{
  "judge_id": "JG-007",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.1", "R1.2", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {"R1.1": 4, "R1.2": 5, "RX.1": 5, "RX.3": 5, "RX.4": 4, "RX.5": 4},
  "rationale": {
    "R1.1": "The output provides a detailed critique and proposed revisions of the draft, which is more than just restating surface phrasing without changing the conceptual object.",
    "R1.2": "Identifies multiple logical inconsistencies in the draft and proposes clear fixes, demonstrating end-to-end engagement with the argument chain.",
    "RX.1": "Flags several contradictions and unsupported claims, marking them as areas of uncertainty.",
    "RX.3": "The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or additional scope.",
    "RX.4": "Avoids introducing new errors but notes that some claims are overconfident due to lack of verification.",
    "RX.5": "Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.1": 0.9,
    "R1.2": 0.8,
    "RX.1": 0.9,
    "RX.3": 1.0,
    "RX.4": 0.7,
    "RX.5": 0.8
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.1: The output provides a detailed critique and proposed revisions of the draft, which is more than just restating surface phrasing without changing the conceptual object.
rationale.R1.2: Identifies multiple logical inconsistencies in the draft and proposes clear fixes, demonstrating end-to-end engagement with the argument chain.
rationale.RX.1: Flags several contradictions and unsupported claims, marking them as areas of uncertainty.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers exactly the agreed J*(d) without any drift or additional scope.
rationale.RX.4: Avoids introducing new errors but notes that some claims are overconfident due to lack of verification.
rationale.RX.5: Every non-cosmetic change is annotated with source and reason, providing clear provenance.
